page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture general-purpose instance powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 8 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, paired with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a moderate to lower-tier processing profile. The instance registers weak single-core and multi-core CPU performance in stress-ng tests, placing in the bottom 25% of tested hardware. Similarly, single-threaded gzip compression is poor, landing in the bottom 10%. However, the server demonstrates average performance in Passmark CPU tests, including extended instructions and encryption benchmarks. Memory bandwidth for large uncached blocks is average, though small-block cached read bandwidth is weak. Redis SET operations perform at an average level of 5.73 million operations per second, while static web serving throughput is weak at 4.53 GB/sec.

The ecs.sn2ne.2xlarge offers a stable, dedicated resource allocation suitable for workloads that require predictable CPU access without the burstable performance degradation of shared-core instances. Given its moderate memory bandwidth and lower computational speeds, it represents a standard general-purpose option where high-density compute or massive memory arrays are not required. It is best suited for moderate database operations, basic web serving, lightweight Redis caching, and general-purpose application hosting that does not demand intensive parallel processing or high-throughput local storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.2xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance configured with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 physical cores operating at 2.5 GHz and 32.0 GB of RAM. Lacking local storage and GPU hardware, it relies on network-attached storage and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Benchmark data shows a mixed performance profile: while stress-ng CPU tests and cached memory bandwidth fall into the bottom 25%, the instance achieves average results in Passmark CPU encryption, large-block memory bandwidth, and Redis SET operations, which reach 5.73 million operations per second. This instance represents a stable, dedicated resource tier for workloads requiring predictable CPU allocation without burstable limitations. It is best suited for general-purpose applications, moderate database tasks, and lightweight caching layers.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.2xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, suitable for stable, moderate workloads.

tagline: A dedicated general-purpose instance offering balanced compute and memory resources for predictable, moderate-scale application hosting and database workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 physical cores at 2.5 GHz
32.0 GB of system memory with a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage or GPU
Average performance in Passmark CPU encryption and Redis SET operations
Best suited for general-purpose hosting, moderate databases, and caching
